personal.name: Daniel Lauding
personal.title: Design Engineer · Lead Product Design · UX/UI · AI Prototyping
personal.subtitle: Creator · Builder · Enabler · Fast Execution · Modern AI Workflow
personal.bio: What started as a childhood fascination with building websites has evolved into 15+ years of crafting digital experiences that matter. From those early days tweaking graphics and rebuilding sites with every new trend, Daniel discovered his passion for the intersection of creativity, technology, and human impact. Today, he's a Design Engineer who thrives on transforming complex problems into elegant, user-centered solutions. Whether co-founding fintech companies serving 400,000+ users or conducting field research in Brazilian favelas for Spotify, Daniel brings a unique blend of strategic thinking, technical execution, and genuine care for the people using what he builds. Currently exploring the frontiers of AI-assisted design and development, he's passionate about leveraging cutting-edge tools to create more meaningful, accessible experiences that truly serve users' needs.
personal.experience: 15+ years • Design to Code • Spotify, Swedbank, Länsförsäkringar • WiFi Tribe nomad • Open for 2026

projects.name: Vromm - Driving Instruction App
projects.description: At Vromm, I lead product design and development – creating a smarter, more structured way for students and instructors to plan, track, and complete driving practice together.

details.challenge: Build a smarter, more engaging way for driving students and instructors to plan, track, and complete practice based on Sweden's 16-step curriculum. Reduce complexity in planning and feedback, especially for private driving pairs.
details.solution: Designed and developed an MVP in React Native using Cursor, Supabase, and GPT-based tools. Connected real-world driving routes to learning objectives with gamified progress tracking.
details.impact: Launching internal MVP with active pilot users. Built a co-creation system using AI to cut dev/design time by 60–70%. Preparing for 2025 public pilot with schools and instructors in Skåne.

sections.title: Research & Discovery
sections.content: Surveys with instructors, students, and parents. Input from startup coaches (ALMI, Minc). Mapping Trafikverket's 16 steps to real routes and increasing clarity in how students approach the curriculum.

sections.title: AI-Powered Development
sections.content: Solo-led product design and development using AI agents (ChatGPT, Claude) to brainstorm, write code, design UI, and validate ideas. Faster design and iteration cycles using co-creation workflows.

sections.title: Product & Validation
sections.content: Built React Native MVP with gamified progress tracking. Connected real-world driving routes to learning objectives. Early positive feedback on visual route-planning and progress tracking.

testimonial.quote: Really impressed with the user experience design and the integration with existing driving school workflows. This could transform how we teach driving.
testimonial.author: Maria Andersson

projects.name: Qasa - Rental Matching Platform
projects.description: At Qasa, I led product design within the Match team – responsible for making it easier and more delightful for tenants and landlords to find each other, connect, and sign homes.

details.team: Cross-functional with PMs, developers, customer support
details.challenge: Improve the Find Tenant flow to reduce friction and increase conversions. Address the complexity of matching and signing workflows for both landlords and tenants.
details.solution: Built high-fidelity, brand-consistent prototypes using AI-enhanced design tooling. Introduced full-journey mapping for both landlords and tenants. Redesigned flows and patterns to scale across the product. Used AI to explore edge cases, accelerate ideation, and prototype faster.
details.impact: Increased usage of Find Tenant tool, improved CSAT scores from landlords (avg. 2.6 to higher scores), positive feedback on image upload improvements and profile clarity.

sections.title: Research & Analysis
sections.content: CSAT scores from landlords highlighted issues in listing and tenant discovery. Market benchmarking across Sweden, Finland, and Norway revealed UX gaps in image upload flows.

sections.title: AI-Enhanced Design Process
sections.content: Led workshops, heuristic audits, and built AI-usable design system components to speed up iteration. Used AI to explore edge cases and accelerate ideation.

sections.title: Lovable Prototyping Tool
sections.content: Built a custom Lovable prototyping tool for Qasa using their design system and branding. Now part of their toolbox for shaping product bets and validating concepts.

testimonial.quote: Daniel stepped in and filled a pair of vacant design-shoes at Qasa during the summer of 2025. As the versatile designer he is - he covered our needs by always delivering multiple alternatives of the UX/UI challenges. Five out of five LinkedIn-stars on Daniel!
testimonial.author: Fredrik Weinestad

projects.name: Asteria - Smart Cash Flow
projects.description:
At Asteria, I transformed complex financial tools into intuitive digital products for SMEs, reaching over 400,000 users through partnerships with Swedbank and PayEx.

As Co-Founder and Lead Product Designer, I was responsible for product vision, UX/UI, and stakeholder alignment.

details.challenge: Bring advanced cash flow and financial planning tools to SMEs in a way that feels accessible, delightful, and easy to integrate with banking workflows.
details.solution: Led design from discovery to delivery. Built modular design systems, dashboards, and forecasting interfaces embedded in partner platforms.
details.impact: Over 400,000 users through partnerships. Successfully rolled out Företagskollen to Swedbank's SME clientele. PayEx integrated solution launched with prominent banks.

sections.title: SME Research & Discovery
sections.content: Comprehensive user research with SMEs revealed complex financial planning pain points. Small business owners needed simpler, digital cash flow management solutions.

sections.title: Banking Partnership Integration
sections.content: Designed modular systems for integration with Swedbank and PayEx platforms. Created embedded financial tools that felt native to each partner's ecosystem.

sections.title: Scalable Design Systems
sections.content: Built design systems and dashboard interfaces that served 400,000+ users. Focused on making complex financial data accessible and actionable for non-experts.

testimonial.quote: I've had the pleasure of working with Daniel for over 5 years. Daniel is a great resource and it has been a joy to see how Daniel has developed during our time working together. I highly recommend hiring Daniel.
testimonial.author: Anders Nordkvist

projects.name: Spotify - Data Saver Feature
projects.description:
At Spotify, I designed a low-data music streaming experience tailored to users in emerging markets like Brazil.

I conducted field research in favelas to understand data usage behaviors and reduce barriers caused by high data costs.

details.challenge: Make Spotify usable in low-bandwidth areas and increase adoption in favelas and other regions with data limitations.
details.solution: Designed and tested a 'Data Saver' theme that streamed music with 1% of the normal data use. Conducted field interviews and user testing on-site in Brazil.
details.impact: Successfully launched feature with increased adoption in target markets and measurable improvements in retention. Feature let users play four on-demand playlists with just 1% of their data.

sections.title: Field Research in Brazil
sections.content: Conducted field interviews and user testing on-site in Brazil. Studied data usage behaviors and understood real barriers caused by high data costs in favelas.

sections.title: Data Saver Design
sections.content: Designed a feature that let users play four on-demand playlists with just 1% of their data. Created intuitive UI that made data usage transparent and controllable.

sections.title: A/B Testing & Launch
sections.content: After nail-biting A/B tests, the Data Saver feature stood out as a game-changer. Made streaming feel safer and more accessible even without Wi-Fi.

testimonial.quote: Users felt confident using Spotify while on the move. It was a game-changer, making streaming on Spotify feel a whole lot safer and more accessible, even when Wi-Fi was out of reach.
testimonial.author: Internal User Research

projects.name: Länsförsäkringar - Digital Design System
projects.description:
At Länsförsäkringar, I modernized the digital brand identity in collaboration with Identity Works.

I led the creation of a design system adopted across web, mobile, and internal platforms.

details.team: Cross-functional with designers, developers, and brand team
details.challenge: Unify fragmented digital experiences while maintaining accessibility and local presence across web, mobile, and internal platforms.
details.solution: Created a responsive design system and guidelines for all digital channels. Integrated accessibility standards (Funka). Worked alongside internal design teams and external partners. Aligned with stakeholders early through weekly meetings to move fast and efficiently.
details.impact: Awarded 'Best App & Web 2017'. Created a scalable foundation still in use today. The design system enabled Länsförsäkringar to maintain consistency while rapidly iterating on new features and services.

sections.title: Research & Discovery
sections.content: Conducted comprehensive audit of existing digital properties. Analyzed user pain points across web and mobile platforms. Collaborated with brand team to understand company values and translate them into digital principles. Mapped out customer journeys and identified key touchpoints requiring design attention.

sections.title: Design System Architecture
sections.content: Built a complete design system from the ground up using Figma and component libraries. Created design tokens for colors, typography, spacing, and motion. Developed modular components that could scale across web, iOS, and Android. Established clear documentation and guidelines for implementation.

sections.title: Cross-Platform Implementation
sections.content: Rolled out design system across web platforms, mobile apps, and internal portals. Worked closely with development teams to ensure pixel-perfect implementation. Created accessibility guidelines meeting WCAG standards. Trained teams on design system usage and maintenance.

sections.title: Award-Winning Results
sections.content: The unified digital experience launched successfully across all platforms. Won Best App & Web 2017 recognition for excellence in digital design. The design system enabled Länsförsäkringar to maintain consistency while rapidly iterating on new features and services.

testimonial.quote: Daniel is a skilled Art Director with an eye for detail. He works super fast and comes up with suggestions for new approaches. He maintains a high pace with high quality. Daniel has been part of the process to develop Länsförsäkringar's new digital expression and we have had high pressure but so much fun during the time. Good luck going forward, hope we get to work together again soon :)
testimonial.author: Liza Hansson
testimonial.role: Strategic Lead Designer at Variant Sverige

projects.name: Företagskollen – Swedbank
projects.description: Together with Swedbank, we built Företagskollen – a cash flow management tool integrated into online banking for over 400,000 business clients.

details.challenge: Small business owners often found cash flow management complex and expressed a need for a simpler, digital solution integrated into their everyday banking.
details.solution: Företagskollen pulls transactions and balances from company accounts, sorting and forecasting them to present an easy-to-understand visual of future cash flow, all within the digital banking experience.
details.impact: Successfully rolled out to Swedbank's SME clientele, reaching 400,000+ business customers. Now a versatile tool beyond Swedbank's platform, with plans to expand accessibility especially on mobile.

sections.title: Setting the Goal
sections.content: Our mission was to integrate cash flow management into the everyday banking activities of small businesses, offering them a clear, visual snapshot of their financial health.

sections.title: Gaining Insights
sections.content: Företagskollen pulls transactions and balances from company accounts, sorting and forecasting them to present an easy-to-understand visual of future cash flow, all within the digital banking experience.

sections.title: Design & Delivery
sections.content: Starting from the ground up, I led the design process, getting involved in everything from coding to feature refinement and user interface improvements. Collaboration was key, working closely with both Swedbank and our Asteria team, drawing on user feedback to continuously enhance our solution.

testimonial.quote: I've had the pleasure of working with Daniel for over 5 years. Daniel is a great resource and it has been a joy to see how Daniel has developed during our time working together. I highly recommend hiring Daniel.
testimonial.author: Anders Nordkvist

projects.name: Invoice Portal – PayEx
projects.description: In partnership with PayEx (a Swedbank subsidiary), we designed a streamlined invoice administration and factoring portal for SMEs across the Nordic region.

details.challenge: PayEx customers (primarily SMEs) required a streamlined solution to simplify their invoice administration and factoring needs, saving valuable time and resources.
details.solution: We developed a user portal and a partner admin section for PayEx to manage their users and the platform. Key features included mapping invoices for automation and scanning invoice information for transmission to PayEx.
details.impact: The integrated solution was successfully launched with two prominent banks, offering a streamlined experience for SMEs in managing their factoring and invoicing needs.

sections.title: Setting the Goal
sections.content: Our objective was to design a customer journey that made obtaining factoring services effortless for SMEs, leveraging Asteria's integrations with a white-label factoring platform.

sections.title: Gaining Insights
sections.content: By diving deep into the needs of SMEs and understanding the intricacies of factoring and invoicing, we aimed to create a user-centric portal and admin interface that addressed these requirements effectively.

sections.title: Design & Delivery
sections.content: We developed a user portal and a partner admin section for PayEx to manage their users and the platform. Key features included mapping invoices for automation and scanning invoice information for transmission to PayEx, ensuring a smooth and automated workflow.

projects.name: Addictive Keys – XLN Audio
projects.description: Redesigned XLN Audio's Addictive Keys plugin to create a more engaging, intuitive, and creator-focused experience for music producers.

details.challenge: Creators were spending too much time searching for the right sounds and grappling with an interface that wasn't as user-friendly as it could be, especially in the standalone version.
details.solution: The proposed redesign included an AI-based sound recommendation engine for tailored suggestions, a simplified instrument library interface for quick access, and a refreshed flat design with skeuomorphic details to facilitate an intuitive user journey.
details.impact: The concept was well-received by XLN Audio, acknowledging the innovative approach and its potential to significantly enhance the creative experience on the platform.

sections.title: Setting the Goal
sections.content: The concept aimed to streamline the sound selection process through AI-driven recommendations, unify the interface for ease of use, and adapt the platform to better fit individual creative processes.

sections.title: Gaining Insights
sections.content: Research into current VST interface trends pointed to a need for a responsive, modern design that balanced skeuomorphic elements with flat design for better navigation and user experience.

projects.name: KLM Royal Dutch Airlines
projects.description: Joined AKQA Amsterdam to give KLM's web platform a fresh new look, making travel planning smooth and enjoyable for millions of passengers.

details.challenge: KLM wanted to make their online experience as friendly and easy to use as their flights — finding flights, getting information, and planning trips needed to be simpler.
details.solution: With each sprint, we got closer to a design that would make finding flights, getting information, and planning trips simpler and more enjoyable, working closely with KLM's team.
details.impact: The KLM project resulted in a complete design set ready for launch at beta.klm.com. The project was ultimately redirected as the business decided to pursue a different path.

sections.title: Setting the Goal
sections.content: Our goal was to create a website that would make planning a trip with KLM smooth and enjoyable, reflecting the warmth and efficiency KLM is known for.

sections.title: Design Process
sections.content: We worked closely with KLM's team, diving deep into what travelers need and want from an airline's website. With each sprint, we got closer to a design that would make finding flights and planning trips simpler.

projects.name: Backbase – Digital Banking Platform
projects.description: At Backbase, designed UI/UX solutions for top-tier global banks including ABN Amro, UniCredit, UOB Singapore, and Standard Chartered.

details.client: ABN Amro, UniCredit, UOB Singapore, Standard Chartered
details.challenge: Evolve an existing platform to accommodate the intricate requirements of digital banking, ensuring comprehensive user experiences across various devices and a themeable platform for diverse clients.
details.solution: Developed a themeable platform 'Launchpad' to enrich user experiences, aiding partners in customizing their interfaces with their branding. Crafted an admin panel and CMS improvements, often turning around design requests in just days.
details.impact: Launchpad significantly enhanced delivery efficiency for online and mobile banking projects, ensuring consistent UX across platforms. Strengthened Backbase's market position with major banking clients worldwide.

sections.title: Setting the Goal
sections.content: Swiftly design and roll out adaptable, responsive UI/UX solutions for prominent banking clients, fostering a seamless digital banking journey.

sections.title: Gaining Insights
sections.content: The task involved bridging traditional banking systems with a contemporary, intuitive user interface, maintaining consistent UX on multiple devices and creating a themeable platform for diverse user preferences.

sections.title: Design & Delivery
sections.content: Quick response to design requests, often turning them around in just days. Responsibilities grew to encompass development of a themeable platform, partner customization support, and admin panel creation.

testimonial.quote: Daniel is a very talented designer we have hired for Backbase. He delivers top quality work while being efficient. Daniel is a multi talent who's also a great guy and fun to work with. If I have the opportunity to hire him again in the future, I would certainly do that.
testimonial.author: Wouter Koeleman

projects.name: Åbro Bryggeri – Website Redesign
projects.description: Teamed up with Producks and Folkets Stockholm to give Åbro Bryggeri's online space a fresh new look — welcoming, easy to navigate, and full of character.

details.challenge: Åbro wanted to make their website more welcoming and easier to use, to really show off what makes them unique as a beloved Swedish brewery.
details.solution: Focused on designing a user-friendly site that captures Åbro's spirit, with a special CMS to keep things running smoothly behind the scenes. Spent time getting to know Åbro, their team, and their fans.
details.impact: Launched Åbro's new site in early 2015, bringing their story and products to life online. Created a user-friendly CMS focusing on simplicity and future growth.

sections.title: Design Approach
sections.content: We spent a lot of time getting to know Åbro, their team, and their fans. This helped us make sure the new site would feel just right — welcoming, easy to navigate, and full of character.

projects.name: Steem – Web2Print Platform
projects.description: Launched Steem, an internal startup within Navii design agency, revolutionizing the Web2Print sector for Swedish organizations.

details.challenge: Available systems were too rigid and complex for effectively personalizing marketing communications for Swedish organizations.
details.solution: Built an accessible online storefront and a backend system for admins, allowing for the upload of customizable templates and defining editable sections for end-users.
details.impact: Quickly embraced by key organizations including Centerpartiet. Steem was nominated as Sweden's best Web2Print tool at the Graphic Awards in November 2011.

sections.title: Setting the Goal
sections.content: We aimed to craft a platform that made it effortless for users to order and personalize their marketing materials, enhancing their online experience.

sections.title: Gaining Insights
sections.content: We hit the road, meeting with customers across Sweden to demo and test our platform, gathering critical feedback to refine our approach.

details.overview: Building a smarter, more engaging way for driving students and instructors to plan, track, and complete practice based on Sweden's 16-step curriculum. Solo-developed using AI-assisted workflows.

testimonials.quote: Really impressed with the user experience design and integration with existing workflows.
testimonials.author: Maria Andersson

details.overview: Interactive web app for gingerbread house competitions. Features voting, submissions, and community engagement around Swedish holiday traditions.

testimonials.quote: Such a fun way to celebrate the holidays with the community!
testimonials.author: Community Member

apps.name: Greeto
apps.description: Create personal greeting cards in seconds

details.overview: Create greeting cards that touch hearts. Personal greetings in just seconds, completely free. Perfect for Swedish holidays and special occasions.

testimonials.quote: Perfect for creating beautiful Swedish greeting cards quickly!
testimonials.author: User

experience.title: Founder & Design Consultant
experience.description: Design & development consultancy serving clients like Qasa, Spotify, Swedbank, Länsförsäkringar, and KLM. 15+ years of product design and development.

recommendations.quote:
I had the pleasure of supporting and coaching Daniel during his tenure as a Product Designer at small startup. His performance consistently exceeded expectations, particularly given the high-paced, complex environments and demanding stakeholders he often navigated.

Daniel possesses a truly strong eye for product design, coupled with an uncompromising attention to detail, which results in genuinely excellent customer experiences. He doesn't just execute; he is deeply strategic. Daniel has a rare ability to quickly identify inefficiencies or breakdowns in the design process and takes proactive, effective steps—both strategic and tactical—to improve our ways of working and overall output quality.

His extensive experience, ranging from agile startup environments to large-scale enterprises, speaks volumes about his versatility and adaptability. Regardless of the organizational size or domain, Daniel reliably delivers work of exceptional quality.

What truly sets him apart is his unwavering commitment to growth. Daniel is relentlessly interested in learning and improving, not only as a product designer dedicated to his craft but also as a professional and a human being. He would be an invaluable asset to any team seeking a high-performing, strategically-minded, and growth-oriented Product Designer. I recommend him without reservation.
recommendations.author: Jens Wedin
recommendations.role: Design Director, Service Designer, CEO, Author

recommendations.quote: I highly recommend Daniel! He helped us iterate design, prototype and test really fast. Daniel is at the cutting edge by combining a design, user experience understand, using AI coding - and being able to code himself!
recommendations.author: Fredrik Eklöf
recommendations.role: CEO & Founder | Peer Coaching @Emotional Fitness Sweden

projects: SkiStar (Present) – Consultant Lead Product Design. Leading product design for Scandinavia's premier ski resort app, enhancing booking flows, lift pass management, and on-mountain experiences for winter sports enthusiasts. Focused on streamlining resort navigation, real-time snow conditions, and seamless booking journeys that adapt to changing mountain conditions and guest needs. (https://apps.apple.com/se/app/skistar/id406481077)

All Aboard (2025) – Product Design Consultant. UX heuristic evaluation and redesign of train ticket booking platform. Focused on offer selection, route visualization, and journey comparison. Improved clarity in multi-leg journeys, seat selection, flexibility rules, and carrier differentiation. Created wireframes and UI designs ready for implementation. (https://allaboard.eu)

Qasa (2025) – Senior Product Design Consultant. Led Match team product design, built AI-enhanced prototyping tools using Lovable, Figma, AI Prototyping, improved tenant-landlord matching flows. Created custom Qasa Design Systems replica for AI tools. (https://www.qasa.se)

Fröjd Interactive (2025) – Frontend Design Consultant. React, Vue, Next.js, Storybook, Figma, and WordPress projects. Responsive component-based UIs with accessibility standards across multiple client projects. Design Systems development and implementation. (https://frojd.se)

1-Week Design Sprint – Lund Startup (2025) – Led intensive design sprint. Delivered clickable prototypes, design refinements, and user-tested solutions using AI-assisted design tools and workshop facilitation. (https://www.less-studio.co/)

Energiforsk (2025) – Frontend Developer. Sweden's most energy-efficient website using Next.js, achieving 75% performance improvement. Accessibility and sustainability focus. (https://www.energiforsk.se)
Gavlegårdarna (2025) – UX/UI Designer & Frontend Developer. Housing platform for 30,000+ residents in Gävle. Vue.js with WCAG AA compliance and multi-language support. (https://www.gavlegardarna.se)

Record Union (2017-2018) – UX/UI Designer. Indie music artists online publishing platform. Responsible for UX & UI foundation and design systems for music distribution platform. (https://www.recordunion.com)

Spotify Data Saver (2017) – Product Design Consultant. Led UX design for low-data streaming feature for Brazil/emerging markets. Conducted field research in favelas, delivered 1% data usage solution. (https://www.spotify.com)

Länsförsäkringar (2016-2017) – Art Director Consultant with Identity Works. Digital Design Systems for Sweden's largest insurer. Cross-platform web, mobile, and internal portals. Figma, component libraries, and design tokens. Won Best App & Web 2017. (https://www.lansforsakringar.se)
KLM (2015) – Senior Design Consultant with AKQA Amsterdam. Online booking and travel experience redesign. Wireframes, flows, component designs for international platform. (beta.klm.com)
DDB Stockholm (2015) – UX Consultant. Samsung projects with design department. Wireframing, prototyping, and UX design for consumer electronics interfaces. (https://www.ddb.com)

Backbase (2012-2017) – Lead Designer. Banking platform UI for ABN Amro, UniCredit, UOB Singapore, Standard Chartered. Design Systems, component libraries, Figma workflows, and themeable admin portals for financial institutions. (https://www.backbase.com) 'Daniel is a very talented designer we have hired for Backbase. He delivers top quality work while being efficient. Daniel is a multi talent who's also a great guy and fun to work with. If I have the opportunity to hire him again in the future, I would certainly do that.' — Wouter Koeleman, Sr Manager Talent Acquisition

Various startups and SMEs (2007-Present) – Product design, UX research, frontend development across fintech, healthcare, e-commerce. 15+ years serving clients from early-stage startups to Fortune 500 companies.
